Package com.marswars.swerve_lib.module

Class ModuleTalonFX

java.lang.Object
com.marswars.mechanisms.MechBase
com.marswars.swerve_lib.module.Module
com.marswars.swerve_lib.module.ModuleTalonFX
All Implemented Interfaces:
SubsystemIoBase
public class ModuleTalonFX extends Module
TalonFX-based swerve module implementation with optional simulation support.

  • Constructor Details

    • ModuleTalonFX

      public ModuleTalonFX(String logging_prefix, int index, SwerveModuleConfig config)
      Creates a new TalonFX swerve module.
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - Logging prefix for telemetry
      index - Module index (0-3)
      config - Module configuration
